title: Meta expands Business Agent for customer conversations across messaging apps
friendlyTitle: Meta is bringing AI customer helpers to more businesses
summary: Meta announced Meta Business Agent and an enterprise Business Agent Platform for customer support, product recommendations, appointment booking, lead qualification, and business-message summaries. Meta says more than one million businesses are already using a Business Agent on WhatsApp and Messenger, with expansion to Instagram.
friendlySummary: Meta’s Business Agent can answer customer questions, recommend products, book appointments, and summarize messages across apps like WhatsApp, Messenger, and Instagram.
whyItMatters: For small businesses, agentic customer service is moving into channels customers already use daily. The practical upside is faster responses and better triage; the risk is that businesses need clear escalation rules when a human should step in.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could help small businesses reply faster, but they still need simple rules for when a real person should take over.
